title: Can I trust public lb？
content: I consider this the best approach (it significantly outperforms others in terms of public test RMSE, and I find the trick very clever). However, on the public leaderboard, it trails my best-performing model by 0.2 to 0.3. So, should I trust the public leaderboard?

comments.content: Nah, check this then you can understand why:https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/rogii-wellbore-geology-prediction/discussion/704663#3467297
Also, does anyone have any good ideas? I'm stuck right now and feel like I can't climb any higher.
